dataset.description: This dataset provides comprehensive agricultural data for Rajasthan, India from 2018 to 2019. It contains four tabless: Crop_Production_Data, Water_Usage_Data, Soil_Analysis_Data, and Crop_Price_Data. This dataset will be a valuable resource for researchers and data scientists working in the agricultural sector, enabling them to analyze and model various aspects of agricultural practices and market dynamics in Rajasthan.

columns.description: Administrative district in Rajasthan where crop price was recorded
columns.name: District

columns.description: Type of agricultural crop being traded
columns.name: Crop

columns.description: Name of the Agricultural Produce Market Committee (APMC) mandi where transactions occurred
columns.name: Market

columns.description: Transaction date in YYYY-MM-DD format
columns.name: Date

columns.description: Market rate per quintal (100kg) of crop in Indian Rupees
columns.name: Price (INR/quintal)

columns.description: Administrative district in Rajasthan where cultivation occurred
columns.name: District

columns.description: Type of cultivated crop
columns.name: Crop

columns.description: Growing season (Kharif = monsoon season, Rabi = winter season)
columns.name: Season

columns.description: Total cultivated land area measured in hectares
columns.name: Area (hectares)

columns.description: Agricultural output per hectare measured in quintals
columns.name: Yield (quintals)

columns.description: Total crop production converted to metric tons (1MT = 10 quintals)
columns.name: Production (metric tons)

columns.description: Administrative district in Rajasthan where soil sample was collected
columns.name: District

columns.description: Classification of soil composition (e.g., Black lava soil, Clay, Saline)
columns.name: Soil Type

columns.description: Acidity/alkalinity measurement on 0-14 scale
columns.name: pH Level

columns.description: Percentage of organic material in soil composition
columns.name: Organic Matter (%)

columns.description: Available nitrogen per hectare for plant growth
columns.name: Nitrogen Content (kg/ha)

columns.description: Available phosphorus per hectare for plant growth
columns.name: Phosphorus Content (kg/ha)

columns.description: Available potassium per hectare for plant growth
columns.name: Potassium Content (kg/ha)

columns.description: Administrative district in Rajasthan where water usage was measured
columns.name: District

columns.description: Type of crop being irrigated
columns.name: Crop

columns.description: Water application technique (e.g., Drip, Sprinkler, Canal)
columns.name: Irrigation Method

columns.description: Actual water used per hectare for irrigation
columns.name: Water Consumption (liters/hectare)

columns.description: Accessible water resources per hectare for agricultural use
columns.name: Water Availability (liters/hectare)

desc: This dataset provides comprehensive agricultural data for Rajasthan, India from 2018 to 2019. It contains four tabless: Crop_Production_Data, Water_Usage_Data, Soil_Analysis_Data, and Crop_Price_Data. This dataset will be a valuable resource for researchers and data scientists working in the agricultural sector, enabling them to analyze and model various aspects of agricultural practices and market dynamics in Rajasthan.
goal: Use crop production data (including crop type, season, area, yield) to analyze crop productivity in different districts and seasons, predict future yield trends, and support decision-making in agricultural production.
name: Visual Analytics System agriculture_goal2_1742628132

plan.path: The user starts with View 1 (Overview) analyzing seasonal yields across districts through grouped bar charts. By clicking crops of interest, View 2 (Exploration) updates to show extreme performers via lollipop charts. Interactions in View 2 filter View 3's boxplots to highlight anomalies. Simultaneously, View 4 provides water efficiency insights through heatmaps. Selections propagate to View 5 showing soil-yield correlations in scatterplots. Finally, View 6 synthesizes findings via radar charts showing production clusters.

effect.description: Selects specific crop(s) to filter subsequent views

visualization.description: Small multiples grouped bar charts showing seasonal yield distributions across districts, grouped by crop. Each vertical column represents a different crop type.

effect.description: Filters view 3 by selected district-crop combinations

visualization.description: Lollipop chart variant showing top/bottom yielding districts. Size encodes yield magnitude, color shows crop type.

effect.description: Shows parallel coordinates sparklines in tooltip linking yield outliers with cultivation area metrics

visualization.description: Horizontal boxplots with outlier indicators showing yield distributions per district. Red markers highlight values beyond 3σ.

views.components: Slider for selecting top-N crops by yield

visualization.description: Heatmap showing water efficiency ratios. Darker cells indicate higher yields per liter consumed.
Bubble chart matrix showing relationships between soil nutrients and yields. Larger bubbles indicate higher yields.
Radar chart showing seasonal production patterns and yield correlations. Cluster boundaries are highlighted with translucent overlays.

visualization.reason: Original box plot interactions violate system constraints - scatterplot brushing maintains detection capability while respecting technical limits
visualization.requirement: Use interactive brushing instead of hover for anomaly detection

sqls.SQL: CREATE VIEW view_1 AS SELECT crop_production_data.District, crop_production_data.Season, crop_production_data.Yield (quintals), crop_production_data.Year, water_usage_data.Irrigation_Method, water_usage_data.Water_Consumption per_hectare, soil_analysis_data.Nitrogen_Content_per_ha, soil_analysis_data.Phosphorus_Content_per_ha FROM crop_production_data JOIN water_usage_data ON crop_production_data.District = water_usage_data.District AND crop_production_data.Crop = water_usage_data.Crop JOIN soil_analysis_data ON crop_production_data.District = soil_analysis_data.District AND crop_production_data.Crop = soil_analysis_data.Crop
sqls.name: view_1

sqls.SQL: CREATE VIEW view_2 AS SELECT view_1.District, view_1.Crop, view_1.Yield (quintals), view_1.Irrigation_Method, view_1.Water_Consumption_per_hectare, view_1.Nitrogen_Content_per_ha, view_1.Phosphorus_Content_per_ha FROM view_1 JOIN crop_production_data ON view_1.District = crop_production_data.District AND view_1.Crop = crop_production_data.Crop
sqls.name: view_2

sqls.SQL: CREATE VIEW view_3 AS SELECT view_1.Yield (quintals), view_1.Area (hectares), view_1.Irrigation_Method, view_1.Water_Consumption_per_hectare, view_1.Nitrogen_Content_per_ha, view_1.Phosphorus_Content_per_ha FROM view_1 JOIN crop_production_data ON view_1.District = crop_production_data.District AND view_1.Crop = crop_production_data.Crop
sqls.name: view_3

sqls.SQL: CREATE VIEW view_4 AS SELECT view_1.Water-Consumption_per_hectare, view_1.Yield (quintals) FROM view_1 JOIN crop_production_data ON view_1.District = crop_production_data.District AND view_1.Crop = crop_production_data.Crop
sqls.name: view_4

sqls.SQL: CREATE VIEW view_5 AS SELECT view_1.Nitrogen_Content_per_ha, view_1.Phosphorus_Content_per_ha, view_1.Yield (quintals) FROM view_1 JOIN crop_production_data ON view_1.District = crop_production_data.District AND view_1.Crop = crop_production_data.Crop
sqls.name: view_5

sqls.SQL: CREATE VIEW view_6 AS SELECT view_1.Production (metric tons), view_1.Yield (quintals), view_1.Season FROM view_1 JOIN crop_production_data ON view_1.District = crop_production_data.District AND view_1.Crop = crop_production_data.Crop
sqls.name: view_6

tasks.method: Use small multiples bar charts with districts on x-axis and yield on y-axis, grouped by season (Kharif/Rabi). Include interactive filters for crops. Coordinated tooltips show production metrics. Color encoding distinguishes seasons.
tasks.objective: Compare seasonal productivity patterns across districts to identify high/low performance regions

tasks.method: Create a sortable table with lollipop charts showing top/bottom 5 districts per crop. Columns: District, Crop, Yield. Interactive sorting triggers animated transitions. Highlight extremes using diverging color scales.
tasks.objective: Identify districts with maximum/minimum yields for specific crops to inform best practices replication

tasks.method: Scatterplot matrix combining district-aggregated soil nutrients (D3) and yields. Brush selections update maps showing spatial distribution. Trend lines show polynomial regression relationships.
tasks.objective: Analyze relationships between soil composition and crop productivity at district level

tasks.method: Box plots showing yield distributions per district with hover details. Integrated MAD-based outlier detection marks points beyond 3σ. Parallel coordinates plot links outliers with cultivation area metrics.
tasks.objective: Detect anomalous yield patterns requiring investigation into cultivation practices or data quality

tasks.method: Apply k-means clustering to group districts by yield/production metrics across seasons. Radial visualization encodes cluster characteristics. Dynamic PCA projection aids cluster interpretation.
tasks.objective: Discover groups of districts with similar production profiles to enable regional policy planning

tasks.method: Scrollable heatmap (V4) showing water-yield ratios for top-10 crops. Columns: Irrigation methods, rows: Crops. Color intensity represents yield per liter consumed. Linked histograms show distribution details.
tasks.objective: Optimize irrigation strategies by identifying water-efficient crops and methods
